---
title: "Compound Forms, Prefixes, Suffixes, and Naming Runes"
---

# Compound Forms, Prefixes, Suffixes, and Naming Runes

Range: `1583-1645`.

Use the summary table for scanning. Each row links to the detailed anchored entry below.

| Sigil | Term                                  | Summary                                                                                          |
| ----- | ------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 1583  | [-able](#rune-1583)                   | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1584  | [-aware](#rune-1584)                  | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1585  | [-by-design](#rune-1585)              | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1586  | [-centric](#rune-1586)                | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1587  | [-complete](#rune-1587)               | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1588  | [-driven](#rune-1588)                 | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1589  | [-first](#rune-1589)                  | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1590  | [-free](#rune-1590)                   | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1591  | [-friendly](#rune-1591)               | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1592  | [-hard](#rune-1592)                   | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1593  | [-less](#rune-1593)                   | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1594  | [-local](#rune-1594)                  | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1595  | [-native](#rune-1595)                 | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1596  | [-of-record](#rune-1596)              | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1597  | [-oriented](#rune-1597)               | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1598  | [-safe](#rune-1598)                   | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1599  | [-sensitive](#rune-1599)              | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1600  | [-shaped](#rune-1600)                 | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1601  | [-soft](#rune-1601)                   | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1602  | [-tolerant](#rune-1602)               | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1603  | [-wide](#rune-1603)                   | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1604  | [actor model](#rune-1604)             | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1605  | [API-first](#rune-1605)               | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1606  | [append-only](#rune-1606)             | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1607  | [best-effort](#rune-1607)             | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1608  | [branch-free](#rune-1608)             | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1609  | [cloud-native](#rune-1609)            | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1610  | [command-query](#rune-1610)           | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1611  | [control plane {Rune}](#rune-1611)    | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1612  | [copy-on-write {Rune}](#rune-1612)    | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1613  | [crash-only](#rune-1613)              | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1614  | [data plane {Rune}](#rune-1614)       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1615  | [data-driven](#rune-1615)             | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1616  | [default-deny](#rune-1616)            | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1617  | [edge-native](#rune-1617)             | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1618  | [event-driven](#rune-1618)            | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1619  | [eventually consistent](#rune-1619)   | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1620  | [fail-fast](#rune-1620)               | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1621  | [first-class](#rune-1621)             | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1622  | [hot path {Rune}](#rune-1622)         | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1623  | [infrastructure-as-code](#rune-1623)  | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1624  | [least-authority](#rune-1624)         | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1625  | [lock-free {Rune}](#rune-1625)        | A progress word; some thread always moves forward without a lock.                                |
| 1626  | [machine-readable](#rune-1626)        | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1627  | [memory-safe {Rune}](#rune-1627)      | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1628  | [multi-tenant](#rune-1628)            | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1629  | [negative cache](#rune-1629)          | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1630  | [object-capability](#rune-1630)       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1631  | [offline-first {Rune}](#rune-1631)    | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1632  | [policy-as-code](#rune-1632)          | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1633  | [queue-backed](#rune-1633)            | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1634  | [read path](#rune-1634)               | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1635  | [read-through cache](#rune-1635)      | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1636  | [real-time {Rune}](#rune-1636)        | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1637  | [rule-based](#rune-1637)              | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1638  | [side-effect-free {Rune}](#rune-1638) | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1639  | [single source of truth](#rune-1639)  | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1640  | [soft delete](#rune-1640)             | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1641  | [statefulset](#rune-1641)             | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1642  | [write path](#rune-1642)              | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1643  | [write-through cache](#rune-1643)     | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1644  | [zero-downtime](#rune-1644)           | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1645  | [zero-knowledge](#rune-1645)          | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |

## Entries

### [1583] -able {#rune-1583}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

### [1584] -aware {#rune-1584}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Pocket gloss:** Marks that something notices the surrounding condition it names.

### [1585] -by-design {#rune-1585}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

### [1586] -centric {#rune-1586}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

### [1587] -complete {#rune-1587}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

### [1588] -driven {#rune-1588}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Pocket gloss:** Signals that behavior is organized around events or causes.

### [1589] -first {#rune-1589}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Pocket gloss:** Declares priority or design center: security-first, API-first, offline-first.

### [1590] -free {#rune-1590}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

### [1591] -friendly {#rune-1591}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

### [1592] -hard {#rune-1592}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

### [1593] -less {#rune-1593}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

### [1594] -local {#rune-1594}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

### [1595] -native {#rune-1595}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

### [1596] -of-record {#rune-1596}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

### [1597] -oriented {#rune-1597}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

### [1598] -safe {#rune-1598}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

**Pocket gloss:** Asserts a protected behavior such as memory-safe or thread-safe.

### [1599] -sensitive {#rune-1599}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

### [1600] -shaped {#rune-1600}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

### [1601] -soft {#rune-1601}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

### [1602] -tolerant {#rune-1602}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

### [1603] -wide {#rune-1603}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

### [1604] actor model {#rune-1604}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

### [1605] API-first {#rune-1605}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Pocket gloss:** Design the interface surface before the implementations behind it.

### [1606] append-only {#rune-1606}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Pocket gloss:** History grows by addition rather than mutation.

### [1607] best-effort {#rune-1607}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

### [1608] branch-free {#rune-1608}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

### [1609] cloud-native {#rune-1609}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

### [1610] command-query {#rune-1610}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

### [1611] control plane {Rune} {#rune-1611}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

### [1612] copy-on-write {Rune} {#rune-1612}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

### [1613] crash-only {#rune-1613}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

**Pocket gloss:** Only live briefly, start fast, and recover by restart rather than repair.

### [1614] data plane {Rune} {#rune-1614}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

### [1615] data-driven {#rune-1615}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

### [1616] default-deny {#rune-1616}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Pocket gloss:** Access is forbidden unless explicitly granted.

### [1617] edge-native {#rune-1617}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

### [1618] event-driven {#rune-1618}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Pocket gloss:** Action propagates from events rather than from direct polling or command loops.

### [1619] eventually consistent {#rune-1619}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

### [1620] fail-fast {#rune-1620}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Pocket gloss:** Abort early when assumptions break instead of smearing damage forward.

### [1621] first-class {#rune-1621}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

### [1622] hot path {Rune} {#rune-1622}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

### [1623] infrastructure-as-code {#rune-1623}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Pocket gloss:** Operational change expressed as reviewable source.

### [1624] least-authority {#rune-1624}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

### [1625] lock-free {Rune} {#rune-1625}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A progress word; some thread always moves forward without a lock.

### [1626] machine-readable {#rune-1626}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Pocket gloss:** Structured so software, not only humans, can read it reliably.

### [1627] memory-safe {Rune} {#rune-1627}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

### [1628] multi-tenant {#rune-1628}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

### [1629] negative cache {#rune-1629}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

### [1630] object-capability {#rune-1630}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

### [1631] offline-first {Rune} {#rune-1631}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

**Pocket gloss:** Designed to keep working with poor or absent connectivity.

### [1632] policy-as-code {#rune-1632}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Pocket gloss:** Policy declared as versioned, testable code.

### [1633] queue-backed {#rune-1633}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

### [1634] read path {#rune-1634}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

### [1635] read-through cache {#rune-1635}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

### [1636] real-time {Rune} {#rune-1636}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

### [1637] rule-based {#rune-1637}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

### [1638] side-effect-free {Rune} {#rune-1638}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

### [1639] single source of truth {#rune-1639}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Pocket gloss:** One canonical place others are expected to mirror.

### [1640] soft delete {#rune-1640}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

### [1641] statefulset {#rune-1641}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

### [1642] write path {#rune-1642}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

### [1643] write-through cache {#rune-1643}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

### [1644] zero-downtime {#rune-1644}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

**Pocket gloss:** Change introduced without taking the service dark.

### [1645] zero-knowledge {#rune-1645}

**Status:** canonical

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.
